overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a dark red coat walking along a mountain trail at night. The character passes under a large rock formation and continues toward distant lights, with the environment featuring natural rock formations, lush grass, and illuminated lanterns along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail near pond approaching rock arch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: calm water reflecting the night sky, situated beside the trail
massive natural rock formation forming an archway over the path ahead
worn dirt trail winding through the mountain terrain
grass-covered slopes rising on both sides of the trail
scattered rocks and gravel along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a mountain trail at night, with a pond visible to the left and a large rock arch formation ahead. The environment is open with full sky visibility and natural moonlight illuminating the grass-covered hillsides.

events.description: entering the shadowed area under the large rock formation
ambient light drops significantly as character moves under rock overhang

agents.ego_description: walking under the rock arch, moving from open air into the shadowed enclosure

entered.detail: underside of the rock formation forming a ceiling over the path
wooden post with lit lantern providing warm artificial light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowed area beneath the rock arch, where the sky is no longer visible and the lighting becomes significantly darker. A lantern post appears on the right, providing the first artificial light source along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside path with distant settlement lights

events.description: exiting the rock formation back into open mountain terrain
emerging from shadow into mixed moonlight and lantern illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail toward distant lights visible on the hillside ahead

entered.detail: simple wooden fence lining the right side of the trail
warm lights from buildings or campfires visible far ahead on the path
distant mountain peaks silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the rock formation, the character continues along an open trail with wooden fences appearing on the right. Distant warm lights are visible ahead, suggesting a settlement or campsite, while the path winds through grass-covered hills under the night sky.

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the wooden signpost, continuing along the main trail

entered.detail: tall wooden post with multiple directional signs and attached lanterns
wooden bench situated beside the trail for resting

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a trail junction marked by a prominent wooden signpost with multiple directional signs and lanterns. After passing the signpost and a wooden bench, the character continues along the path as the distant lights remain visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit mountain trail that transitions from open wilderness through a dark rock passage toward a distant settlement. It begins with the character walking past a pond under a clear night sky, moving steadily toward a massive rock arch formation. As the character enters the shadowed space beneath the arch, the sky vanishes and the environment plunges into darkness, punctuated only by the appearance of a single lantern post on the right. The scene then opens back into the night air as the character emerges from the rocks, passing wooden fences and winding through grassy hills toward a cluster of warm, distant lights. Finally, the path leads to a trail junction marked by a lantern-lit wooden signpost and a bench before continuing forward toward the glowing horizon.
